title: Senior Software Engineer, Cloud Services
description:
Teamwork makes the stream work.
 
  
 


**Roku is changing how the world watches TV** 

 Roku is the \\#1 TV streaming platform in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, and we've set our sights on powering every television in the world. Roku pioneered streaming to the TV. Our mission is to be the TV streaming platform that connects the entire TV ecosystem. We connect consumers to the content they love, enable content publishers to build and monetize large audiences, and provide advertisers unique capabilities to engage consumers.
 



 From your first day at Roku, you'll make a valuable \\- and valued \\- contribution. We're a fast\\-growing public company where no one is a bystander. We offer you the opportunity to delight millions of TV streamers around the world while gaining meaningful experience across a variety of disciplines.
 



  
 






**About the Role** 

 Roku Search team directly contributes to Roku's mission by helping connect users to the content they like and enabling content publishers to build and monetize large audiences.
   

 Our team builds state\\-of\\-the\\-art machine learning algorithms to optimize search relevance and highly scalable, reliable \\& low latency search platform infrastructure to power a delightful search experience. We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to help us take our Search infrastructure to the next level of scalability, power innovation, and growth worldwide.
 



  
 


**What you'll be doing** 
* You will build \\& support world\\-class search platform infrastructure that power Search Query Understanding, Autocomplete, Candidate Retrieval (Lexical \\& Embedding Based), Search ranking, and personalization.
* Iterate and optimize for our improving platform KPIs (Key Performance Indicators), driving reliability, stability, low latency, and cost efficiency across search API \\& indexing systems, ML infrastructure, and search data platforms.
* Manage individual project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables with limited supervision.



  
 


**We're excited if you have** 
* 5\\+ years of experience building large\\-scale software solutions to concrete problems.
* Strong CS fundamentals. Should be able to write an algorithm with ease.
* You are fluent in one of the high\\-level programming languages like Java, Scala, Go, or Python.
* We would love to see that you have worked with big data systems (Spark, Kafka, Flink, S3, Airflow)
* Expert in data storing solutions. Able to make a reasoned choice between various products like MySQL, DynamoDB, Redis, RocksDB
* Have experience with ETL pipelines, both streaming and batch.
* In\\-depth knowledge of at least one search engine (Elasticsearch, Solr, Lucene, Vespa)
* Ability to thrive as a self\\-driven employee who can follow tasks from conception to creation.



  
 













  
 


**Our Hybrid Work Approach** 

 Roku fosters an inclusive and collaborative environment where teams work in the office Monday through Thursday. Fridays are flexible for remote work except for employees whose roles are required to be in the office five days a week or employees who are in offices with a five day in office policy.
 



  
 


**Benefits** 

 Roku is committed to offering a diverse range of benefits as part of our compensation package to support our employees and their families. Our comprehensive benefits include global access to mental health and financial wellness support and resources. Local benefits include statutory and voluntary benefits which may include healthcare (medical, dental, and vision), life, accident, disability, commuter, and retirement options (401(k)/pension). Employees are supported in taking time off, in accordance with local leave policies and other personal needs to support their evolving work and life needs. It's important to note that not every benefit is available in all locations or for every role. For details specific to your location, please consult with your recruiter.
 



  
 


**Accommodations** 

 Roku welcomes applicants of all backgrounds and provides reasonable accommodations and adjustments in accordance with applicable law. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point in the hiring process, please direct your inquiries to EmployeeRelations@Roku.com.
 



  
 


**The Roku Culture** 

 Roku is a great place for people who want to work in a fast\\-paced environment where everyone is focused on the company's success rather than their own. We try to surround ourselves with people who are great at their jobs, who are easy to work with, and who keep their egos in check. We appreciate a sense of humor. We believe a fewer number of very talented folks can do more for less cost than a larger number of less talented teams. We're independent thinkers with big ideas who act boldly, move fast and accomplish extraordinary things through collaboration and trust. In short, at Roku you'll be part of a company that's changing how the world watches TV.
 



 We have a unique culture that we are proud of. We think of ourselves primarily as problem\\-solvers, which itself is a two\\-part idea. We come up with the solution, but the solution isn't real until it is built and delivered to the customer. That penchant for action gives us a pragmatic approach to innovation, one that has served us well since 2002\\.
 



 To learn more about Roku, our global footprint, and how we've grown, visit https://www.weareroku.com/factsheet.
 



 By providing your information, you acknowledge that you want Roku to contact you about job roles, that you have read Roku's Applicant Privacy Notice, and understand that Roku will use your information as described in that notice. If you do not wish to receive any communications from Roku regarding this role or similar roles in the future, you may unsubscribe at any time by emailing WorkforcePrivacy@Roku.com.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description:
We are seeking a detail\\-oriented Accountant to manage our financial records, oversee invoicing, and ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements. The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundational understanding of accounting principles and be proficient in modern office software. This role is essential for maintaining financial integrity and supporting our company's daily operations.
   

  

* Maintain and reconcile all company ledgers to ensure accuracy and legal compliance.
* Accurately process invoices, payroll within our digital systems and monitor financial transactions..
* Perform administrative and clerical tasks related to finance, employee welfare, and general business operations.
* Handle official company mail and professional correspondence effectively.
* Experience: 0\\-3 years of professional or significant academical experience.
* Financial/Accounting knowledge: Basic understanding of financial principles and accounting practices.
* Compute Proficiency: Skilled in using computers and standard office productivity suites (specifically Microsoft Excel/Spreadsheets and Word)..
* Experience: 1\\-3 years of professional experience.


 We’re on the hunt for motivated Junior Software Engineers ready to launch their careers by diving into world\\-class research and development. Ideal candidates have a talent for C\\-like languages and a solid grasp of hardware basics. If you’re excited about building innovative tech and being part of something big, we want you on our team! This role offers a rare chance to connect the worlds of software and hardware. You’ll play a key part in creating and testing firmware and software for advanced embedded systems, directly contributing to groundbreaking solutions that will drive the future of our industry.
   

  

* Design, develop, and test high\\-quality C/C\\+\\+ code for microcontrollers and embedded platforms.
* Collaborate with senior engineers and hardware teams to integrate software with electronic components and systems.
* Debug and resolve issues related to both software and hardware interaction.
* Contribute to all phases of the R\\&D lifecycle, from initial concept to deployment.
* Maintain clear, concise documentation of code, design specifications, and test procedures.
* Experience: 0\\-2 years of professional or significant project experience in software development.
* Coding Proficiency: Strong proficiency in at least one C\\-like language (C, C\\+\\+, Java, C\\#).
* Electronics Knowledge: Basic understanding of electronics and digital electronics principles.
* Hardware Familiarity: Working knowledge of microcontrollers (e.g., PIC, AVR, ARM) architecture and programming concepts.
* Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and challenges.
* Language Preference: Strong, demonstrated practical experience with the C language.
* Hardware Skills: Ability to read and interpret basic circuit diagrams.
* Design Skills: Basic Proficiency in any CAD software.
* Mindset: A strong desire to be part of something big and contribute to world\\-class research and development.


 Conduct testing and validation of electronic prototypes and systems. Collaborate with software teams to ensure seamless hardware\\-software integration. Maintain detailed documentation of design specifications and test procedures.
   

  

* Design and develop electronic circuits for embedded systems and IoT applications.
* Perform circuit simulation, analysis, and optimization using industry\\-standard EDA tools.
* Create PCB layouts, CAD files and oversee the fabrication and assembly process.
* Conduct testing and validation of electronic prototypes and systems.
* Collaborate with software teams to ensure seamless hardware\\-software integration.
* Education: Bachelor's degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or related field (or equivalent hands\\-on experience)
* Experience: 0\\-2 years of experience in electronics design and development.
* You have a solid foundation in both electrical components (power systems, motors) and electronics (digital/analog circuits, microcontrollers).
* Components: Knowledge of electronic components, sensors, and microcontrollers.
* Testing: Experience with oscilloscopes, multimeters, and other test equipment.
* PCB Design: Hands\\-on experience with PCB design and layout optimization.
* Simulation: Proficiency in SPICE simulation and circuit modeling.
* Programming: Basic knowledge of embedded programming (C/C\\+\\+, Python).
* A portfolio of personal projects (e.g., robots, automated systems, IoT devices).

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Summary:** 




*I don’t need a hard disk in my computer if I can get to the server faster…* 
 \\~ Steve Jobs
 



 The world is moving to the cloud, and so are we. Our vision is to enable users of MATLAB \\& Simulink to run and access our products in environments of their choice. Giving them the power to build, test and deploy their applications at scale, or the freedom to connect to their MATLAB’s running on server with a click of a button. The list of possibilities is endless.
 



 This team will drive our product offerings to be cloud\\-native, integrate them with other cloud\\-native systems and serve the needs of next generation of computing.
 



 Come join the external integrations team at MathWorks.
 



  





**Role \\& responsibilities:** 




 We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled senior software engineer who is willing to adapt their technical skillsets to meet the ever\\-changing needs of the computing world.
 



 As a member of the team you will
 


* Be responsible for the design and implementation of MATLAB's integration with popular frameworks such as AWS CloudFormation, ARM Templates, JupyterHub, JupyterLab, GitHub, etc.
* Solve open problems in systems design and architecture.
* Coordinate with teams across the globe to deliver production level software.
* Stay abreast with the latest developments of the cloud computing eco\\-system.
* Help define the external integration SDK of MATLAB and our other products



  





**Minimum qualifications:** 



* A bachelor's degree and 6 years of professional work experience (or a master's degree and 3 years of professional work experience, or a PhD degree, or equivalent experience) is required.



  





**Additional qualifications:** 



* Prior exposure to the following is a strong plus:
* Cloud technologies, like AWS.
* Containerization technologies, like Docker.
* Container orchestration systems, like Kubernetes.
* Continuous Integration \\& delivery systems, like Travis CI or Jenkins.
* Demonstrated ability to dive into and work with large code bases.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills.



  





 Interested candidates can share their updated resume to
 **"keshavk@mathworks.com"**

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Programmers.io is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative software development and AI\\-driven solutions to clients across various industries. Our company specializes in leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies to solve complex business challenges, enhance operational efficiencies, and drive digital transformation. With a focus on excellence, integrity, and customer satisfaction, Programmers.io has established a reputation for delivering high\\-quality, scalable, and customized solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. Our team comprises highly skilled professionals passionate about harnessing the power of technology to create impactful results and foster long\\-term partnerships.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer specializing in Python, AI/ML, and Generative AI to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have extensive hands\\-on experience in developing and deploying machine learning models, particularly in the realm of generative AI and large language models (LLMs). This role involves designing sophisticated AI/ML pipelines, implementing state\\-of\\-the\\-art generative AI solutions, and working with cloud platforms such as Azure and AWS to ensure scalable and efficient deployment. The Senior Software Engineer will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams to translate business requirements into innovative AI solutions, contributing to the company's mission of delivering transformative technology products.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.
* 6 to 14 years of professional experience in software development, with a focus on AI/ML and backend development.
* Proven expertise in Python programming and related frameworks such as FastAPI.
* Strong knowledge of generative AI, LLMs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini), and Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
* Hands\\-on experience with cloud platforms including Azure and AWS, particularly Amazon Bedrock.
* Experience working with vector stores, schema validation, and output parsers.
* Familiarity with machine learning libraries such as Scikit\\-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills, with the ability to develop innovative solutions for complex challenges.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative environment.
* Immediate joiners preferred, with the ability to work remotely or in a hybrid setup for Jaipur and Hyderabad locations.


**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and implement end\\-to\\-end AI/ML pipelines, from understanding business requirements to deployment and monitoring.
* Create advanced Generative AI solutions utilizing LLMs such as OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Gemini for applications like document processing, chatbots, and intelligent automation.
* Implement Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures using LangChain, vector stores, and schema validation techniques to enhance model accuracy and relevance.
* Build and optimize models tailored for NLP, forecasting, and computer vision tasks to meet project\\-specific objectives.
* Apply machine learning algorithms and frameworks effectively to develop scalable and robust AI solutions.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams including product managers, data scientists, and DevOps to ensure seamless integration and deployment of AI models.
* Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI/ML and generative AI technologies, continuously improving solutions and recommending innovative approaches.
* Maintain best practices in code quality, version control, and documentation to ensure maintainability and scalability of solutions.


**Benefits**
 At Programmers.io, we believe in fostering a supportive and growth\\-oriented work environment. Our employees enjoy competitive compensation packages, flexible working hours, and opportunities for professional development. We provide access to cutting\\-edge tools and technologies, enabling our team members to stay at the forefront of AI and software development. Additionally, we promote a healthy work\\-life balance through remote work options and collaborative team culture. Our commitment to innovation and excellence ensures that every team member has the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to impactful projects and advance their career in a stimulating environment.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Programmers.io is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team fosters innovation, creativity, and a broader perspective, which ultimately contributes to our success and the success of our clients. We encourage qualified candidates from all backgrounds to apply and join our team in shaping the future of technology.

title: Software Development Engineer – Routing, C, Linux
description:
**Meet the Team**
 Cisco is a global leader in networking and IT, dedicated to transforming how people connect, communicate, and collaborate. We have created an unrivalled company culture that is collaborative, empathetic, and provides employees with the autonomy to develop technology that is intuitive, secure, and simple for everyone to use.
   

  

 Our Routing SD\\-WAN Group is at the forefront of innovation, delivering intelligent, secure, and scalable WAN edge solutions that empower enterprises to connect and protect their networks from the edge to the cloud. Within this group, the Routing Platform Software team builds industry\\-leading SD\\-WAN and edge routing platforms. We are reinventing the WAN with controller\\-based, intent\\-driven networking that delivers secure connectivity to users and devices across cloud, on\\-prem, and SaaS applications. You will join a high\\-energy group working on next\\-generation routing and services at a global scale, connecting thousands of devices and millions of users.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

 In this role, you will develop and evolve the forwarding and platform software that powers our SD\\-WAN and edge routing solutions. You will collaborate with ASIC, hardware, and cross\\-functional engineering teams to define new architectures, implement high\\-performance packet forwarding, and deliver robust, production\\-ready features. You will also leverage modern AI tools to enhance software development practices, driving greater efficiency, quality, and innovation across the team.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Hardware\\-Software Integration: Collaborate closely with hardware engineering teams to bring up new platforms, develop low\\-level drivers, and integrate Network Interface Modules (NIMs).
* Firmware Development: Design, implement, and maintain ROMMON and bootloader software to ensure secure and reliable system initialization.
* Forwarding Plane Optimization: Develop and tune high\\-performance forwarding plane software to meet the rigorous demands of modern secure routing environments.
* L2 Feature Development: Implement and optimize Layer 2 networking protocols and features within the platform stack.
* Performance Debugging: Perform deep\\-dive analysis into performance bottlenecks at the kernel and hardware\\-abstraction layers, including the control plane.
* Modern Development Practices: Utilize modern development workflows, including AI\\-assisted coding tools (such as GitHub Copilot, Claude, or Codex) and IDEs like VSCode, to accelerate the development lifecycle and improve code quality.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 8\\-12 years of industry experience with end\\-to\\-end software development in networking.
* Experience across platforms, system software, kernel/user\\-space drivers, bootloaders, BIOS, and performance tuning spanning control\\-plane and data\\-plane.
* Strong proficiency in C/C\\+\\+ with a focus on systems programming and Linux environments.
* Proven experience in developing device drivers, working with RTOS/Linux kernels, and understanding hardware\\-software interfaces.
* Solid understanding of routing architectures and Layer 2 networking protocols (e.g., Ethernet, VLANs, STP).
* Experience with bootloaders (ROMMON), hardware bring\\-up, and board support packages (BSP).
* Demonstrated ability to debug complex issues spanning hardware, firmware, and software layers.
* Experience with LAN/WAN communication interfaces and Layer 2/Layer 3 technologies.
* Experience with AI/ML techniques and tools for development (e.g., code assistants, static analysis tools, test automation).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of high\\-speed interfaces (PHY, MAC, MACSEC) and DPDK.
* Platform/system expertise such as kernel bring\\-up, driver development, platform/network management software, and cloud networking.
* Debugging experience with i2c, i2c trace analysers, and PCIe.
* Knowledge of x86 or ARM assembly code, instruction sets, and ABIs.
* Experience with debugging using hardware and software debuggers (e.g., GDB, Arium, BDI).


**\\#sdwanhiring**
 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Understand the business requirements and technical constraints and architect/design/develop.
* Participate in the complete development life cycle.
* Review the architecture/design/code of self and others.
* Develop enterprise application features/services using Azure cloud services, C\\# .NET Core, ReactJS etc, implementing DevSecOps principles.
* Own and be accountable for the Quality, Performance, Security and Sustenance of the respective product deliverables.
* Strive for self\\-excellence along with enabling success of the team/stakeholders.


**Requirements**
* 4 to 10 years of experience in developing enterprise software products
* Strong knowledge of C\\#, .NET Core, Azure DevOps
* Working knowledge of the JS frameworks \\- Preferably ReactJS
* Experience in container\\-based development, AKS, Service Fabric etc
* Experience in messaging queue like RabbitMQ, Kafka
* Experience in Azure Services like Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions
* Experience in databases like SQL Server, PostgreSQL
* Knowledge of reporting solutions like PowerBI, Apache SuperSet etc
* Knowledge of Micro\\-Services and/or Micro\\-Frontend architecture
* Knowledge of Code Quality, Code Monitoring, Performance Engineering, Test Automation Tools


**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 "Bright ideas. Brilliant code. The Orange way." At THE ORANGE COMM, we specialize in delivering innovative and cutting\\-edge technology solutions that meet modern business demands. Our focus is on creating robust, scalable, and efficient systems to solve complex challenges. We take pride in fostering a culture of creativity, collaboration, and excellence in everything we do. Based in Hyderabad, we are dedicated to empowering our team to build exceptional solutions for our clients.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a highly skilled Senior DevOps Engineer / Lead Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to build, scale, and optimize cloud\\-native infrastructure for high\\-traffic production systems.
   

  

 If you are passionate about Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, automation, observability, and reliability engineering, we’d love to connect.
   

  

 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role for a Senior DevOps Engineer / Lead Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) based in Hyderabad. The primary responsibilities include designing, implementing, and managing infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC), developing and optimizing software solutions, and establishing best practices in continuous integration and deployment pipelines. The role also involves ensuring the reliability, scalability, and performance of systems while managing Linux\\-based environments and system administration tasks. The engineer will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to deliver resilient platforms and innovate in DevOps practices.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with tools like Terraform, Ansible, or equivalent.
* Strong background in Software Development, including coding practices, debugging, and optimization.
* Hands\\-on experience with Continuous Integration (CI) tools, deployment pipelines, and DevOps workflows.
* Extensive experience in Linux system administration and managing distributed systems.
* Proven understanding of system architecture and scaling complex systems.
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical challenges under tight deadlines.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Cloud platform experience (AWS, Azure, or GCP) is a plus.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with a drive for continuous learning and improvement.


**Responsibilities**
* Managing and scaling Kubernetes platforms to support high\\-traffic applications.
* Automating cloud infrastructure deployment and management using Terraform and other IaC tools.
* Building and maintaining robust CI/CD pipelines to enable seamless software delivery.
* Enhancing platform reliability through monitoring, alerting, and proactive incident management.
* Optimizing cloud costs and implementing infrastructure governance best practices.
* Supporting high\\-availability production environments by implementing resilient and scalable solutions.
* Collaborating with development teams to streamline deployment processes and improve system performance.
* Implementing security best practices to safeguard infrastructure and data integrity.
* Conducting performance tuning and troubleshooting to resolve issues swiftly and efficiently.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work on large\\-scale cloud infrastructure projects with cutting\\-edge technologies.
* Engagement in solving complex scalability and reliability challenges.
* Potential to lead platform engineering initiatives and influence technology strategy.
* Collaborative and innovative work environment that encourages continuous learning.
* Competitive salary package and benefits tailored to industry standards.
* Flexible work arrangements, including remote and hybrid options.
* Professional development opportunities through training, conferences, and certifications.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 At THE ORANGE COMM, we are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe diversity fosters innovation and are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.

 Solid understanding of performance testing methodologies, workload modeling, and capacity planning
